scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run db:migrate && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.deploy:update: npm run build && npm run db:migrate && pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs
